headline: Metaverse Index And ETFs: The Latest Financial Innovations Making Investment In NFTs More Secure
summary: Investing in the Metaverse and NFT industry is possible through various options. headline: Musk Plans To Build 1000+ Starships To Transport 1M People To Mars: A Fleet Of 'Modern Noah's Arks'
